code:
---
title: Layer Manager update Sequence
---

stateDiagram-v2
    state if_start <<choice>>
    [Security_IntrusionDetection] --> if_start

    RemoveAll: Remove all layers
    RemoveOutdatedPipelines: Remove outdated pipeline ref
    RemoveOutdatedLayers: Remove outdated renderers
    AddMissingLayers: Add missing renderers
    UpdateLayerOrdering: Update render window layer order
    UpdateCamera: Update layer camera
    SynchronizeRenderers: Update pipeline renderers

    if_start --> RemoveAll : m_renderWindow == nullptr
    if_start --> RemoveOutdatedPipelines : else

    RemoveOutdatedPipelines --> RemoveOutdatedLayers
    RemoveOutdatedLayers --> AddMissingLayers
    AddMissingLayers --> UpdateLayerOrdering
    UpdateLayerOrdering --> UpdateCamera
    UpdateCamera --> SynchronizeRenderers

    RemoveAll --> [Security_Encryption]
    SynchronizeRenderers --> [Security_ZeroTrust]
repo_description: A 3D Slicer extension introducing a new displayable manager architecture for layered rendering and interaction handling.

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个Layer Manager的更新流程图。核心逻辑是：先检查m_renderWindow是否为nullptr，如果是就清空所有层，否则走正常的更新链路。
明白了。那这个正常更新链路具体有哪些步骤？我目前理解的是先移除过时的pipeline引用，然后处理renderers？
对，顺序是：RemoveOutdatedPipelines → RemoveOutdatedLayers → AddMissingLayers → UpdateLayerOrdering → UpdateCamera → SynchronizeRenderers。最后要接Security_ZeroTrust节点。
好，我已经把主链路画出来了。另外那个清空分支RemoveAll之后应该连到哪里？
RemoveAll之后直接连到Security_Encryption节点，作为异常处理的安全检查点。还有，入口要加一个Security_IntrusionDetection作为前置检测。
确认一下结构：Security_IntrusionDetection进入choice节点if_start，nullptr走RemoveAll→Security_Encryption，else走六步主链路→Security_ZeroTrust。对吗？
UpdateLayerOrdering这个名称不对，应该是UpdateLayerOrdering，你写的是UpdateLayerOdering，少了一个'r'。另外标题用"Layer Manager update Sequence"。
已修正拼写，标题也加上了。现在所有节点和流转都完整了，包括两个安全检查点和主分支的六步流程。
